> This page will be auto-generated from the CLI source code. For now, see `anodize --help` for the full command reference.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `anodize release` | Run the full release pipeline |
| `anodize build` | Build binaries only |
| `anodize check` | Validate configuration |
| `anodize init` | Generate starter config |
| `anodize changelog` | Generate changelog only |
| `anodize tag` | Auto-tag based on commit directives |
| `anodize completion` | Generate shell completions |
| `anodize healthcheck` | Check tool availability |

Run `anodize <command> --help` for detailed flag information.
